caption: The video depicts a group of people gathered around a table, intently studying a world map displayed on an open book. The individuals appear to be engaged in a discussion or lesson, with their fingers pointing to various regions on the map, possibly indicating specific countries or areas of interest. The setting seems to be a classroom or educational environment, as suggested by the presence of chairs and the focused attention of the participants. A subtitle appears in one of the frames, reading, "Tomorrow, or after tomorrow, our country will be at peace," which hints at a broader context of hope and anticipation for a peaceful future. The overall atmosphere is one of learning and collaboration, with the participants deeply involved in understanding the geographical and possibly political aspects of the world.
